summary: The action of a child moving an object between hands suggests they are improving their ability to coordinate what they see with how they move, which is crucial for more complex tasks like writing later on. This behavior also shows basic dexterity but primarily highlights emerging spatial awareness through movement. \boxed{\text{Visual-motor coordination development}}
